mapper.select: select * from ai_chat_session where user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 order by last_active_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into ai_chat_session(user_id, title, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{title}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
select s.*, u.nickname as userName, u.phone as userPhone from ai_chat_session s left join user u on s.user_id = u.user_id
s.is_deleted = 0
and s.user_id = #{userId}
order by s.last_active_time desc
select count(*) from ai_chat_session where is_deleted = 0
select count(distinct user_id) from ai_chat_session where date(last_active_time) = curdate() and is_deleted = 0
